elements.label: Description
elements.value: The smallest and most common fruit. Spawns frequently, merges into Strawberry.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/cherry.schema.json, set ct_cherry_radius to {{ct_cherry_radius}}]
Set Cherry radius to {{ct_cherry_radius}} pixels in data/MergeLadder.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/cherry.schema.json, set ct_cherry_score to {{ct_cherry_score}}]
Set Cherry merge score to {{ct_cherry_score}} points.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/cherry.schema.json, set ct_cherry_weight to {{ct_cherry_weight}}]
Set Cherry spawn weight to {{ct_cherry_weight}} in data/MergeLadder.ts.
